conflicts.description: US (OSTP) requires pre-deployment impact assessments for frontier AI, while EU (AI Act) requires conformity assessments with different scope. Companies face parallel compliance regimes.

conflicts.description: US (Clarity Act proposed) would bifurcate SEC/CFTC oversight of digital assets. EU (MiCA) treats most crypto-assets as e-money or financial instruments. Cross-border listing rules diverge.

conflicts.description: EU (GDPR + Data Act) restricts cross-border data transfer without adequacy decision. UK has separate adequacy regime post-Brexit. Singapore PDPA is more permissive. Multi-region operations require layered controls.

conflicts.description: US (proposed GENIUS Act) requires 1:1 reserve in cash/T-bills with monthly attestations. EU (MiCA Title III) requires authorization and segregation of reserves. Japan allows trust-based reserves with FSA approval.

conflicts.description: UK (CMA Order) mandates bank-to-TPP data sharing with standardized APIs. EU (PSD2 + PSR) extends this to include payments initiation. Singapore (MAS) has framework but no mandate. US has no federal equivalent; CFPB §1033 rule in progress.
